summary: Add watch parent command with add/list/remove/check subcommands: persistent currency-pair watchlist with per-pair movement thresholds, threshold crossings reported on check. Adds Store.UpdateWatchObservation helper that takes writeMu so per-pair UPDATEs serialize against concurrent InsertRateSnapshots.
reason: Persistent watchlist with threshold-checking has no API counterpart. Reviewer flagged that the UPDATE inside check ran outside writeMu (could race InsertRateSnapshots from concurrent sync-rates); routed through a new Store.UpdateWatchObservation helper that takes the lock.
validated_outcome: watch add/list/remove/check end-to-end against live API; UpdateWatchObservation correctly serializes against InsertRateSnapshots under writeMu.
